title: Cryptool verified on X
content_html:
Cryptool was awarded the blue verified badge on X today.

The badge confirms that @cryptool_io is the authentic, official Cryptool account. If you see anyone claiming to represent Cryptool from a different handle, please verify them against the official account first.
author: Cryptool
